recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Hot Fuzz
recommendations.overview: Former London constable Nicholas Angel finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf for a partner. However, when

recommendations.title: Trancers II
recommendations.overview: Once again someone from the future has come back to create an army of Trancers, human zombies who do what they're told without question or pause. Now officer Jack Deth, a cop from the future stranded in the past, must once again go forth to stop them

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: Still Life
recommendations.overview: A council case worker looks for the relatives of those found dead and alone.

recommendations.title: The Final Cut
recommendations.overview: Set in a world with memory implants, Alan Hakman is a 'cutter'—someone with the power of final edit over people's recorded histories—but his latest assignment puts him in great danger.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: Captain Nova
recommendations.overview: A fighter pilot travels back in time to save the future world from environmental disaster, but a side-effect turns her young again and no-one takes her seriously.

recommendations.title: Zombie Hunter
recommendations.overview: When a street drug turns junkies into an army of zombies, a man named Hunter finds himself with nothing but a beat-up car and a trunk full of guns and booze, until he stumbles across a small band of survivors.

recommendations.title: Predestination
